description_long: This is a large, rectangular cargo trailer with a blue exterior and the word 'GRUBER' prominently displayed in white on the side and rear. The trailer features a boxy, enclosed structure with smooth, flat panels and horizontal white stripes running along the sides. It is supported by a set of dual axles with four visible wheels and stabilizing legs for parking. The rear end appears to have a roll-up or swing door for loading and unloading cargo, while the front is designed for hitching to a truck tractor. The construction is primarily metal, likely steel or aluminum, with rubber tires and some plastic or composite trim elements.
description: A large blue cargo trailer with 'GRUBER' branding, dual axles, and a boxy, enclosed design for transporting goods.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue front panel with 'GRUBER' branding and the hitch area below.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the trailer, dual axles, wheels, and prominent 'GRUBER' signage.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back door area with 'GRUBER' branding and the trailer's undercarriage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the trailer's length, wheels, and side branding.
attribute_door_configuration: single rear swing or roll-up door
attribute_branding_or_signage: company name 'GRUBER' in large white letters on side and rear
